title: Ubiquiti UOC-1 - Unifi ODN Cable, 1 Meter
category: Ubiquiti UOC-1 - Unifi ODN Cable, 1 Meter
description: Ubiquiti UOC-1 optical patch cord is suitable for connecting active and passive optical elements. Cable is made as multimode with 50/125 (OM3) fibers, 2mm diameter, 1m length and LC-LC duplex connectors
